name: Assault Vest
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This offensive vest boosts the holder's Sp. Def stat but prevents the use of status moves.

name: Focus Sash
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder has full HP and it is hit with a move that should knock it out, it will endure with 1 HP�but only once.

name: Booster Energy
effect: An item to be held by Pokemon with certain Abilities. The energy that fills this capsule boosts the strength of the Pokemon.

name: Life Orb
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It boosts the power of the holder's moves, but the holder also loses a small amount of HP upon landing an attack.

name: Rocky Helmet
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This helmet damages any attacker that makes direct contact with the holder.

name: Covert Cloak
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This hooded cloak conceals the holder, tricking the eyes of its enemies and protecting it from the additional effects of moves.

name: Choice Scarf
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This curious scarf boosts the holder's Speed stat but only allows the use of a single move.

name: Clear Amulet
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This clear, sparkling amulet protects the holder from having its stats lowered by moves used against it or by other Pokemon's Abilities.

name: Sitrus Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore a small amount of HP to itself.

name: Choice Specs
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. These curious glasses boost the holder's Sp. Atk stat but only allow the use of a single move.

name: Choice Band
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This curious headband boosts the holder's Attack stat but only allows the use of a single move.

name: Leftovers
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It slowly but steadily restores the holder's HP.

name: Safety Goggles
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. These goggles protect the holder from both sandstorm damage and the effects of powders and spores.

name: Mystic Water
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This teardrop-shaped gem boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves.

name: Rusted Shield
effect: It is said that a hero used this shield to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it's grown rusty and worn.

name: Hearthflame Mask
effect: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Fire type during battle.

name: Wellspring Mask
effect: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Water type during battle.

name: Flame Orb
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a bizarre orb that gives off heat when touched and will afflict the holder with a burn during battle.

name: Electric Seed
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the terrain becomes Electric Terrain, the holder will use this seed to boost its own Defense stat.

name: Eviolite
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This mysterious evolutionary lump boosts the Defense and Sp. Def stats when held by a Pokemon that can still evolve.

name: Light Clay
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder uses protective moves like Light Screen or Reflect, their effects will last longer than usual.

name: Mental Herb
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. The holder will be able to shake off move-binding effects to move freely� but only once.

name: Throat Spray
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder uses a sound-based move, this throat spray will boost its Sp. Atk stat.

name: Metal Coat
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a special metallic coating that boosts the power of the holder's Steel-type moves.

name: Power Herb
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It allows the holder to immediately use a move that normally requires a turn to charge�but only once.

name: Cornerstone Mask
effect: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Rock type during battle.

name: Sharp Beak
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a long, sharp beak that boosts the power of the holder's Flying-type moves.

name: Loaded Dice
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This loaded dice always rolls a good number, and holding one can ensure that the holder's multistrike moves hit more times.

name: Rusted Sword
effect: It is said that a hero used this sword to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it's grown rusty and worn.

name: Psychic Seed
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the terrain becomes Psychic Terrain, the holder will use this seed to boost its own Sp. Def stat.

name: Charcoal
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a combustible fuel that boosts the power of the holder's Fire-type moves.

name: Dragon Fang
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This hard, sharp fang boosts the power of the holder's Dragon-type moves.

name: Weakness Policy
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This policy boosts the holder's Attack and Sp. Atk. stats for a while if the holder is hit with a move it's weak to.

name: Splash Plate
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of water and boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves.

name: Eject Button
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder is damaged by an attack, it will be switched out of battle to be replaced by another Pokemon on your team.

name: Shuca Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Ground-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Magnet
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a powerful magnet that boosts the power of the holder's Electric-type moves.

name: Wide Lens
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a magnifying lens that slightly boosts the accuracy of the holder's moves.

name: Spell Tag
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a sinister, eerie tag that boosts the power of the holder's Ghost-type moves.

name: Iron Ball
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It lowers the holder's Speed stat and makes the holder vulnerable to Ground- type moves even if it is a Flying type or is levitating.

name: Black Glasses
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a pair of shady- looking glasses that boost the power of the holder's Dark-type moves.

name: Grassy Seed
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the terrain becomes Grassy Terrain, the holder will use this seed to boost its own Defense stat.

name: Ability Shield
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This cute and rather unique-looking shield protects the holder from having its Ability changed by others.

name: Sky Plate
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of flight and boosts the power of the holder's Flying-type moves.

name: Eject Pack
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder's stats are lowered, it will be switched out of battle.

name: Miracle Seed
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a seed imbued with life force that boosts the power of the holder's Grass-type moves.

name: Heat Rock
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder changes the weather to harsh sunlight, the sunlight will persist for longer than usual.

name: White Herb
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It will restore any lowered stat in battle�but only once.

name: Damp Rock
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder changes the weather to rain, the rain will persist for longer than usual.

name: Never-Melt Ice
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a heat-repelling piece of ice that boosts the power of the holder's Ice- type moves.

name: Iron Plate
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of steel and boosts the power of the holder's Steel-type moves.

name: Adamant Crystal
effect: An item to be held by Dialga. This large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokemon to change form.

name: Black Sludge
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder is a Poison type, this sludge will gradually restore its HP. It damages any other type.

name: Dread Plate
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of darkness and boosts the power of the holder's Dark-type moves.

name: Air Balloon
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This balloon makes the holder float in the air. If the holder is hit with an attack, the balloon will burst.

name: Griseous Core
effect: An item to be held by Giratina. This large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokemon to change form.

name: Zoom Lens
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder acts after its target, its move will be more accurate than usual.

name: Soul Dew
effect: A wondrous orb to be held by Latios or Latias. It boosts the power of their Psychic- and Dragon-type moves.

name: Expert Belt
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a well-worn belt that slightly boosts the power of the holder's supereffective moves.

name: Room Service
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If Trick Room takes effect, this item will lower the holder's Speed stat.

name: Pixie Plate
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of fairies and boosts the power of the holder's Fairy-type moves.

name: Spooky Plate
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of ghosts and boosts the power of the holder's Ghost-type moves.

name: Toxic Orb
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a bizarre orb that exudes toxins when touched and will badly poison the holder during battle.

name: Aguav Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore some HP should it find itself in a pinch. But it will become confused if it hates the Berry's taste.

name: Bright Powder
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This glittery powder casts a tricky glare that lowers the accuracy of opposing Pokemon's moves.

name: Heavy-Duty Boots
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. These boots protect the holder from the effects of traps and the like set on the battlefield.

name: Power Lens
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This lens reduces a Pokemon's Speed in battle but allows its Sp. Atk stat to grow more quickly.

name: Fairy Feather
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This feather, which gleams faintly when hit by light, boosts the power of the holder's Fairy-type moves.

name: Icicle Plate
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of ice and boosts the power of the holder's Ice-type moves.

name: Meadow Plate
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of plants and boosts the power of the holder's Grass-type moves.

name: Lum Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to cure itself of any status condition it may have.

name: Lustrous Globe
effect: An item to be held by Palkia. This large, glowing orb wells with power and allows the Pokemon to change form.

name: Mirror Herb
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This herb will allow the holder to mirror an opponent's stat increases to boost its own stats�but only once.

name: Red Card
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder is damaged by an attack, the mysterious power of this card can remove the attacker from the battle.

name: Scope Lens
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a lens for scoping out weak points. It boosts the holder's critical-hit ratio.

name: Figy Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore some HP should it find itself in a pinch. But it will become confused if it hates the Berry's taste.

name: Silk Scarf
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a sumptuous scarf that boosts the power of the holder's Normal-type moves.

name: Quick Claw
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This light, sharp claw lets the holder occasionally unleash a move faster than it usually would.

name: Adrenaline Orb
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This orb boosts the Speed stat if the holder is intimidated.

name: Zap Plate
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of electricity and boosts the power of the holder's Electric-type moves.

name: Terrain Extender
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It extends the duration of terrain caused by the holder's move or Ability.

name: Big Root
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This root boosts the amount of HP the holder restores to itself when it uses HP-stealing moves.

name: Normal Gem
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of normalcy and will boost the power of a Normal-type move�but only once.

name: Wise Glasses
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This thick pair of glasses slightly boosts the power of the holder's special moves.

name: Chople Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fighting-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Wiki Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore some HP should it find itself in a pinch. But it will become confused if it hates the Berry's taste.

name: Shell Bell
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. The holder restores a little HP to itself every time it inflicts damage with an attack.

name: Chesto Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to shake off its drowsiness.

name: Flame Plate
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of fire and boosts the power of the holder's Fire-type moves.

name: Muscle Band
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This headband exudes strength, slightly boosting the power of the holder's physical moves.

name: Iapapa Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore some HP should it find itself in a pinch. But it will become confused if it hates the Berry's taste.

name: Blunder Policy
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder misses with a move due to low accuracy, this policy will sharply boost its Speed stat.

name: Custap Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to act faster should it find itself in a pinch�but only for the next move it uses.

name: Draco Plate
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of dragons and boosts the power of the holder's Dragon-type moves.

name: Lagging Tail
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. A tail of something, this item is tremendously heavy and makes the holder move slower than usual.

name: Razor Claw
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This sharply hooked claw boosts the critical-hit ratio of the holder's moves.

name: Colbur Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Dark-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Icy Rock
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder changes the weather to snow, the snow will persist for longer than usual.

name: Lustrous Orb
effect: A beautifully shining gem to be held by Palkia. It boosts the power of Palkia's Dragon- and Water-type moves.

name: Maranga Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a special move, the holder's Sp. Def stat will be boosted.

name: Black Belt
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This belt helps with focus and boosts the power of the holder's Fighting-type moves.

name: Punching Glove
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This protective glove boosts the power of the holder's punching moves and prevents direct contact with targets.

effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This spoon is imbued with telekinetic energy and boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves.

effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fairy-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Light Ball
effect: An item to be held by Pikachu. It's a mysterious orb that boosts Pikachu's Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

name: Power Anklet
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This anklet reduces a Pokemon's Speed in battle but allows its Speed stat to grow more quickly.

name: Smooth Rock
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder changes the weather to a sandstorm, the storm will persist for longer than usual.

name: Occa Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fire-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

name: Power Weight
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This weight reduces a Pokemon's Speed in battle but allows its HP stat to grow more quickly.

name: Focus Band
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder is hit with a move that should knock it out, it may be able to endure with 1 HP.

name: Metronome
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It boosts the power of a move that's used repeatedly. Once the chain is broken, the move's power returns to normal.

name: Rowap Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a special move, the attacker will also take damage.

name: Power Band
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This band reduces a Pokemon's Speed in battle but allows its Sp. Def stat to grow more quickly.

effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This loose, silky sand boosts the power of the holder's Ground-type moves.

effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This bracer reduces a Pokemon's Speed in battle but allows its Attack stat to grow more quickly.

effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, its Speed stat will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch.

effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This band boosts the power of binding moves used by the holder.

effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This sturdy umbrella protects the holder from the effects of rain and harsh sunlight.

effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, its accuracy will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch�but only for the next move it uses.

effect: A memory disc that contains Fire-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Fire-type moves to Fire-type Z-Moves.

name: Flying Gem
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of flight and will boost the power of a Flying-type move�but only once.

effect: A memory disc that contains Flying-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Flying-type moves to Flying-type Z-Moves.

effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This incense has a curious aroma that makes the holder move slower than usual.

effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Ice-type moves to Ice-type Z-Moves.

name: Incinium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Incineroar's Darkest Lariat to a Z-Move.

name: King's Rock
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It may cause the target to flinch whenever the holder successfully inflicts damage on them with an attack.

name: Kommonium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Kommo-o's Clanging Scales to a Z-Move.

name: Lax Incense
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. The curious aroma of this incense may cause moves to miss its holder.

name: Leek
effect: An item to be held by Farfetch'd or Sirfetch'd. This very long and stiff stalk of leek boosts the critical-hit ratio of their moves.

name: Lucky Punch
effect: An item to be held by Chansey. This lucky boxing glove boosts the critical-hit ratio of Chansey's moves.

name: Luminous Moss
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This single-use luminous moss boosts the Sp. Def stat if the holder is damaged by a Water-type move.

name: Lunalium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Lunala's Moongeist Beam to a Z-Move.

name: Lycanium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Lycanroc's Stone Edge to a Z-Move.

name: Macho Brace
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. Holding this stiff, heavy brace reduces a Pokemon's Speed in battle but allows its stats to grow more quickly.

name: Marshadium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Marshadow's Spectral Thief to a Z-Move.

name: Metal Powder
effect: An item to be held by Ditto. Extremely fine yet hard, this odd powder boosts Ditto's Defense stat.

name: Mewnium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Mew's Psychic to a Z-Move.

name: Mimikium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Mimikyu's Play Rough to a Z-Move.

name: Normalium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Normal-type moves to Normal-type Z-Moves.

name: Odd Incense
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves.

name: Pikanium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Pikachu's Volt Tackle to a Z-Move.

name: Pikashunium Z
effect: This is a crystallized form of Z-Power. It upgrades Thunderbolt to a Z-Move when used by a Pikachu wearing a cap.

name: Pink Bow
effect: Powers up normal-type moves.

name: Poison Gem
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of poison and will boost the power of a Poison-type move�but only once.

name: Polkadot Bow
effect: Powers up normal-type moves.

name: Quick Powder
effect: An item to be held by Ditto. Extremely fine yet hard, this odd powder boosts Ditto's Speed stat.

name: Reaper Cloth
effect: A cloth imbued with horrifyingly strong spiritual energy. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

name: Red Orb
effect: A shiny red orb that is said to have a deep connection to a legend of the Hoenn region.

effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of rock and will boost the power of a Rock-type move�but only once.

name: Sea Incense

name: Shock Drive
effect: A cassette to be held by Genesect. It changes Genesect's Techno Blast move so it becomes Electric type.

name: Snorlium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Snorlax's Giga Impact to a Z-Move.

name: Solganium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Solgaleo's Sunsteel Strike to a Z-Move.

name: Soothe Bell
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. The comforting chime of this bell calms the holder, making it friendly.

name: Steel Gem
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of steel and will boost the power of a Steel-type move�but only once.

name: Steel Memory
effect: A memory disc that contains Steel-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

name: Steelium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Steel-type moves to Steel-type Z-Moves.

name: Tapunium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade the tapu's Nature's Madness to a Z-Move.

name: Thick Club
effect: An item to be held by Cubone or Marowak. This hard bone of unknown origin boosts their Attack stat.

name: Ultranecrozium Z
effect: It's a crystal that turns Necrozma fused with Solgaleo or Lunala into a new form.

name: Water Gem
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of water and will boost the power of a Water-type move�but only once.

effect: A memory disc that contains Water-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

name: Waterium Z
effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Water-type moves to Water-type Z-Moves.

name: Wave Incense
effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves.

name: Berry Sweet
effect: A berry-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Black Augurite
effect: A glassy black stone that produces a sharp cutting edge when split. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

name: Chipped Pot
effect: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It may be chipped, but tea poured from it is delicious.

name: Clover Sweet
effect: A clover-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Cracked Pot
effect: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It may be cracked, but tea poured from it is delicious.

name: Dawn Stone
effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It sparkles like a glittering eye.

name: Dragon Scale
effect: A very tough and inflexible scale. Dragon-type Pokemon may be holding this item when caught.

name: Dubious Disc
effect: A transparent device overflowing with dubious data. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

name: Dusk Stone
effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It holds dark shadows within it.

name: Electirizer
effect: A box packed with a tremendous amount of electric energy. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

name: Fire Stone
effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It has a fiery orange heart.

name: Flower Sweet
effect: A flower-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Galarica Cuff
effect: A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Giving it to a Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokemon very happy.

name: Galarica Wreath
effect: A wreath made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Placing it on the head of a Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokemon very happy.

name: Ice Stone
effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It has a snowflake pattern in it.

name: Leader's Crest
effect: A shard of what appears to be an old blade of some sort. It is held only by Bisharp that head up a group of Pawniard.

name: Leaf Stone
effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It has an unmistakable leaf pattern.

name: Love Sweet
effect: A heart-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Magmarizer
effect: A box packed with a tremendous amount of magma energy. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

name: Malicious Armor
effect: A peculiar set of armor that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. Malicious will lurks within it.

name: Masterpiece Teacup
effect: A peculiar teacup that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It may be chipped, but tea drunk from it is delicious.

name: Metal Alloy
effect: A peculiar metal that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It is composed of many layers.

name: Moon Stone
effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It is dark like the night sky.

name: Oval Stone
effect: A peculiar stone that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It is round and smooth.

name: Peat Block
effect: A block of muddy material that can be used as fuel for burning when it is dried. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

name: Prism Scale
effect: A mysterious scale that causes a certain Pokemon to evolve. It shines with a beautiful iridescence.

name: Protector
effect: A protective item of some sort. It is extremely stiff and heavy. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

name: Ribbon Sweet
effect: A ribbon-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Sachet
effect: A sachet filled with fragrant perfumes that are just slightly overwhelming. Yet it's loved by a certain Pokemon.

name: Scroll of Darkness
effect: A peculiar scroll that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. Written upon it are the true secrets of the path of darkness.

name: Scroll of Waters
effect: A peculiar scroll that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. Written upon it are the true secrets of the path of water.

name: Shiny Stone
effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It shines with a dazzling light.

name: Star Sweet
effect: A star-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Strawberry Sweet
effect: A strawberry-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

name: Sun Stone
effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It burns as red as the evening sun.

name: Sweet Apple
effect: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It's exceptionally sweet.

name: Syrupy Apple
effect: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It's exceptionally syrupy.

name: Tart Apple
effect: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It's exceptionally tart.

name: Thunder Stone
effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It has a distinct thunderbolt pattern.

name: Unremarkable Teacup
effect: A peculiar teacup that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It may be cracked, but tea drunk from it is delicious.

name: Upgrade
effect: A transparent device somehow filled with all sorts of data. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

name: Water Stone
effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It is the clear blue of a deep pool.

name: Whipped Dream
effect: A soft and sweet treat made of fluffy, puffy, whipped, and whirled cream. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

name: Aspear Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to thaw itself after being frozen.

name: Cheri Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to free itself from paralysis.

name: Hondew Berry
effect: If a Pokemon is fed this Berry, it will grow more friendly, but it will lose base points for its Sp. Atk stat.

name: Kelpsy Berry
effect: If a Pokemon is fed this Berry, it will grow more friendly, but it will lose base points for its Attack stat.

name: Oran Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore 10 HP to itself.

name: Pecha Berry
effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to lift the effects of being poisoned from itself.

name: Pomeg Berry
effect: If a Pokemon is fed this Berry, it will grow more friendly, but it will lose base points for its HP stat.

name: Qualot Berry
effect: If a Pokemon is fed this Berry, it will grow more friendly, but it will lose base points for its Defense stat.

name: Tamato Berry
effect: If a Pokemon is fed this Berry, it will grow more friendly, but it will lose base points for its Speed stat.
